_comment: Runtime identifiers for the SCJ personal/dev AWS account, used by the opentofu-secure plugin. Copy this file to 'scj.local.json' (gitignored) and fill in the REAL values. Skills and scripts resolve placeholders like <SCJ_AWS_ACCOUNT_ID> from the local file at runtime; the public source carries placeholders only. Not a secret (no API tokens/keys here) — this is a non-secret operational identifier kept out of the public source. Personal-machine-only config: unlike insidedesk.local.json, this is not backed up to the macOS Keychain.
